title: Evaluating Design Video Generation: Metrics for Compositional Fidelity
summary: Generative video models are increasingly used in design animation tasks, yet no standardized evaluation framework exists for this domain. Unlike natural video generation, design animation imposes structured constraints: specific components shall animate with prescribed motion types, directions, speed and timing, while non-animated regions must remain stable and layout structure must be preserved. This paper provides a fully automated evaluation framework organized across four dimensions: layout fidelity, motion correctness, temporal quality, and content fidelity. This eliminates the reliance on subjective human evaluation and establishes a common basis for benchmarking progress in the field.
summary_cn: 该论文针对设计动画领域提出视频生成模型的评估框架。与自然视频生成不同，设计动画具有结构化约束：特定组件需按预设运动类型、方向、速度等进行动画。当前缺乏标准化评测指标，论文致力于定义组合保真度（compositional fidelity）的度量方法。对产品经理而言，这一研究有助于量化生成式设计工具（如UI动画、产品演示视频）的质量，推动商业化落地。通过建立统一评估标准，可降低模型选型成本，提升设计自动化产品的可靠性与用户体验。
